title: Taking the Star Ferry
description: Find your gate, pick your deck, and catch the next boat
location: Star Ferry Pier, Tsim Sha Tsui
context: The Star Ferry has crossed Victoria Harbour since 1888. It links Tsim Sha Tsui (Kowloon) to Central and Wan Chai on Hong Kong Island. The upper deck costs a little more but the view is one of the best in the world. Trips take about 8 minutes.
cultural_note: The Star Ferry (天星小輪) has crossed Victoria Harbour since 1888, but it almost disappeared in 1966. A 1-cent fare increase sparked a three-day riot. This is now seen as the first stirring of a distinctly Hong Kong political consciousness, separate from both colonial Britain and mainland China. The fare increase was reversed. The ferry still runs.

lines.speaker: you
lines.cjk: 唔該，去尖沙咀係咪喺呢度搭？
lines.jyutping: m4 goi1, heoi3 zim1 saa1 zeoi2 hai6 mai6 hai2 ni1 dou6 daap3?
lines.english: Excuse me, is this where I catch the ferry to Tsim Sha Tsui?

lines.speaker: staff
lines.jyutping: hai6, paak3 baat3 daat6 tung1 jap6 zaap6 zau6 dak1.
lines.english: Yes, just tap your Octopus at the gate.

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: soeng6 cang4 hai6 mai6 gwai3 di1 gaa3?
lines.english: Is the upper deck more expensive?

lines.speaker: staff
lines.cjk: 係，貴一蚊咋，風景靚好多。
lines.jyutping: hai6, gwai3 jat1 man1 zaa3, fung1 ging2 leng3 hou2 do1.
lines.english: Yes, just a dollar more, and the view is much better.

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: gei2 noi6 jat1 baan1 syun4 aa3?
lines.english: How often do the boats run?

lines.speaker: staff
lines.cjk: 大概十分鐘一班，啱啱開咗一班。
lines.jyutping: daai6 koi3 sap6 fan1 zung1 jat1 baan1, ngaam1 ngaam1 hoi1 zo2 jat1 baan1.
lines.english: About every ten minutes. One just left.
